_comment: This file defines entry points for code-level config discovery. Key_files and sub_configs are starting references, not exhaustive lists — actual fields are discovered dynamically by parsing the source code.

env_vars.discovery_method: Parse all dict keys for env var names; extract lambda logic for defaults; extract TYPE_CHECKING block for type annotations

engine_args.discovery_method: Parse dataclass fields for config names and types; parse add_cli_args() for CLI argument names and mapping to config fields

config_classes.discovery_method: Scan all .py files in dir for *Config classes; extract field names, types, defaults, and docstrings from each class; cross-reference with VllmConfig in vllm/config/vllm.py

env_vars.discovery_method: Parse all dict keys for env var names; extract lambda logic for defaults; extract inline comments for documentation

additional_config.discovery_method: Parse __init__ for additional_config.get() calls to discover top-level fields; locate sub-config class instantiations to discover sub-config names; parse each sub-config __init__ for field names, types, and defaults

platform_overrides.discovery_method: Parse method for config override logic that may modify defaults or add constraints
